1.title: Storage bucket + policies
1.description: Create private Supabase Storage bucket 'images' plus storage.objects RLS policies scoped to auth.uid() folder prefix, as a new migration file.

2.title: Auth core
2.description: Implement shared DB row types, Supabase browser/server/service clients (@supabase/ssr), allowlist helper, the /api/auth/gate OAuth callback route, and middleware.ts session-refresh/redirect logic.

3.title: UI + edges
3.description: Build login page, denied page, replace home page boilerplate with authed placeholder, health cron route, vercel.json cron config, and rewrite .env.local.example to the real key contract.
3.branch: worktree-agent-a63895c3863d6375f (git lost mid-run; files applied manually to master)

completed_summaries.1: Added a migration creating the private 'images' Supabase Storage bucket plus storage.objects RLS policies (select/insert/update/delete) scoped to each user's auth.uid() folder prefix. Idempotent via existence checks.
completed_summaries.2: Implemented shared DB row types, browser/server/service Supabase clients (@supabase/ssr), the isAllowed() allowlist+owner-override check, the /api/auth/gate OAuth callback (exchange code, check allowlist, upsert profile, redirect), and middleware.ts session refresh with login/home redirects. Middleware matcher excludes /api/auth/gate, /api/health, /denied, and static assets.
completed_summaries.3: Built the Google sign-in page + neutral denied page (CSS Modules), replaced the create-next-app home page with an authed server-component placeholder, added the Bearer-protected /api/health cron warm-ping route, vercel.json's daily cron entry, and rewrote .env.local.example to the real key contract.
